Header.value: 1. Speaker segments — draw to ADD a missed part, drag edges to fix timing, delete wrong ones, change speaker, edit text per segment

2. Full Corrected Transcript (optional override) — if the AI segments are too rough, fix the whole transcript here. KEEP the [MM:SS - MM:SS] prefix on each line to preserve timestamps. When filled, this REPLACES the segments above on export.

TextArea.name: full_transcript
TextArea.placeholder: One line per turn, keep the time prefix, e.g. [00:03 - 00:08] Agent: namaste sir... [00:09 - 00:14] Customer: haan ji boliye... (A new line with no [..] prefix gets the previous line's end time.)

Choice.hint: Mark as ready for client delivery
